tweet.text: Damn man my guy Joe D. One of my ALL TIME favorite coaches and men. I will always miss those big hugs pregame! And him always asking about my family first! One of a kind. Prayers for his Fam and the Ravens! ✝️

Watching you clowns attack Nico makes me laugh. Kid can’t even buy a beer legally. Makes a mistake and grown men who have accomplished nothing have something to say. Stay strong. These moments are when real men with courage grow. The future is limitless for you. #manintheARENA
